title: Bitcoin: The Beauty of Mathematics (Part 68)
thesis_bullets: Hey everyone and thanks for jumping back into the cryptoverse.
Today we're going to talk about Bitcoin, the beauty of mathematics part 68.
You can also check out my other website benjenkowan.com as well.
Let's go ahead and jump in.
So the cryptocurrency market cap is coming in at around 2.29 trillion.
This is still about 50 to 55% I think 50 53.55% below that quote unquote fair value logarithmic aggression trend line.
One of the things you'll notice this cycle is there wasn't really a period where the asset class went durably overvalued.
And we talked about that through the cycle.
And the reason it never went durably overvalued this past cycle was because altcoins never really joined in on the bull market.
Very similar to what happened in the 2019 bull market where we never had more of a we never really had a durable overvaluation because altcoins never really joined in on on the fund.

hypotheses.statement: BTC continuation edge appears when signal alignment persists on daily.
hypotheses.rationale: Research and indicator mentions converge on trend-continuation logic with confirmation filters.
hypotheses.falsifiable_test: Backtest BTC on daily: require >=55% win rate and positive expectancy over 200+ trades; reject if unmet.

candidate_signals.name: alignment_entry
candidate_signals.description: Enter only when primary trend signal and confirmation filter agree on bar close.

strategy_heuristics_used: Every hypothesis should include explicit regime assumptions and invalidate conditions.
Separate signal logic from execution logic to reduce confounded performance attribution.
Require risk gating concepts before scaling complexity in entry or exit rules.
automation_heuristics_used: Keep human approval checkpoints for high-impact automation and deployment transitions.
Enforce deterministic session gating before any live-capable execution pathway is enabled.
Invest first in telemetry for risk, latency, and execution drift before adding new automation features.
